title: Chugach Alaska Corporation ranks sixth among Alaskan-owned businesses
summary: In order to be considered for the annual Top 49er list, a company must be: A for-profit or not-for-profit organization; At least 51% Alaskan-owned; Headquartered in Alaska; and Operating in Alaska. Alaska Business began the Top 49er list in 1984, and Chugach has made the list 31 times. While Chugach...
